name: Charitable Beneficiary Life Insurance Exclusion

eligibility.description: A person described in section 170(c) (charity) must be the sole beneficiary of the insurance portion for the entire taxable period.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Excludes the cost of group-term life insurance from income if a charitable organization is the sole beneficiary of the policy for the entire year.
